request.description: CHECKOUT.ORDER.APPROVED event notification payload (HTTPS POST body). The payload field schema is NOT documented on the provided pages.

responses.description: Receiver must respond with HTTP 200 or other 2xx status code. If the endpoint does not respond successfully, PayPal reattempts delivery up to 25 times over the course of 3 days.

missing: The JSON payload fields of CHECKOUT.ORDER.APPROVED are not documented on the provided pages; the body is left unspecified rather than inferred.
summary: CHECKOUT.ORDER.APPROVED webhook. Delivered as an HTTPS POST to your subscribed listener URL when a buyer approved a checkout order.
